positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a majestic mountain range bathed in golden hour light. The peaks should feature bold, stylized silhouettes with dramatic, contrasting negative space. Incorporate abstract, swirling wind patterns and scattered, stylized celestial elements like crescent moons and stylized stars. Use a limited palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, cream, and slate gray. The composition must be central, suitable for repeating or single-panel apparel design, maintaining a clean, graphic, and sophisticated aesthetic. Highly detailed line work, flat graphic design style, high contrast, bold shapes, vector art, perfect symmetry.
negative: photorealism, messy, noisy, blurry, text, words, logo, watermark, signature, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, gradient skin, jpeg artifacts, out of focus, low resolution
